what: Stage harden_eval non-vacuity proof: a fresh blind judge scored 4 fixtures under NEUTRAL labels (item1..item4, no good/bad hint) using the per-mode rubric. Neutral->fixture mapping applied after judging: item1=good_popsci, item2=bad_academic, item3=good_academic, item4=bad_popsci. The judge was maker-independent (a separate agent; the loop owner authored the fixtures).

results.hard_fail: Register collapse into clickbait/hype (emoji, ALL-CAPS, listicle shell, like-and-subscribe) + an invented/false claim ('Big Science doesn't want you to know this').

discrimination: good_popsci PASS / bad_popsci FAIL AND good_academic PASS / bad_academic FAIL — the per-mode rubric discriminates BOTH modes. The good_popsci PASS specifically proves the popsci track rewards legitimate craft (it would FAIL under an academic-shaped register dim).
